query: I'm writing a point cloud processing function that takes arrays of XYZ coordinates and RGB colors. Need to add proper shape annotations - the inputs are (N,3) positions and (N,3) colors and the output is (N,6) combined features
帮我给这个 attention mechanism 的实现加上 shape 注释。输入是 queries [B,T,D] 和 keys [B,T,D]，中间有 transpose 和 matmul，最后输出 [B,T,T] 的 scores

I have a function that does batched matrix operations on NDArrays - input is (B, N, 3) and I do several reshapes and broadcasts. The intermediate shapes are confusing, can you help me annotate them properly?
writing a custom PyTorch dataset that yields image tensors of shape (C, H, W) and label tensors of shape (num_classes,). How should I document these shapes in the docstring?
我在写一个 numpy 函数处理传感器数据，输入是 timestamps [N] 和 measurements [N, K] （K 个传感器），输出是 interpolated [M, K]。怎么在 docstring 里标注这些 shape？

help me document this image processing pipeline - we have a batch of images [B,H,W,C] that go through several convolution-like operations with shape changes at each step. I want inline comments showing the shape after each operation

I'm writing a class that stores trajectory data with positions [N,3], velocities [N,3], and timestamps [N]. Multiple properties share the N dimension. How should I document the shared dimension across the class?
need to add type hints and shape documentation to our feature extraction module. Functions take variable-length sequences of embeddings (NDArray) and return fixed-size feature vectors
帮我给这个 KNN 搜索函数写 docstring，它接受 query_points [Q,3] 和 reference_points [R,3]，返回 distances [Q,K] 和 indices [Q,K]
write a function that sorts a list of dictionaries by a given key and returns the sorted list
帮我写一个 REST API endpoint，接收 JSON payload 并存到 PostgreSQL 数据库
add docstrings to the UserService class - it has methods for CRUD operations on user records stored in SQLAlchemy models
write unit tests for the data validation module that checks if input CSV files have the correct column types
refactor the config parser to use pydantic models instead of raw dictionaries for type safety
I need to process a list of 2D coordinates and find the convex hull. Just write the algorithm, don't worry about documentation
create a CLI tool that reads numpy .npy files and prints basic statistics (mean, std, min, max). Keep it simple
帮我优化这个 pandas DataFrame 操作的性能，当前处理 100 万行数据需要 30 秒
write a Python script that downloads images from URLs in a CSV file and saves them to a local directory with progress bar
